product.description: Professional MIDI switcher with 3 loops, 9 presets, and USB/MIDI connectivity. Perfect for controlling your entire pedalboard with a single device.

loops.title: 3 Effect Loops
loops.desc: True bypass loops for your effects pedals

presets.title: 9 Presets
presets.desc: Store and recall your favorite setups instantly

midi.title: MIDI Control
midi.desc: Full MIDI program change and CC control

editor.title: MS-3 PRESET EDITOR
editor.subtitle: Configure your presets and MIDI messages
editor.exportDesc: Download your preset configuration as a JSON file.

policy.heading: 30-DAY RETURN POLICY
policy.text: We offer a 30-day return policy for all products in original condition. If you're not satisfied, return within 30 days for a full refund.

eligibility.heading: ELIGIBILITY
items: Product must be in original packaging
Product must show no signs of use

howToReturn.heading: HOW TO RETURN
steps: Contact support@logicdesaudio.com to request a return
Pack product securely in original packaging
Ship to the address provided by our team
Refunds processed within 14 days of receipt

shipping.heading: SHIPPING COSTS
shipping.text: Customer is responsible for return shipping costs unless the product is defective.

defective.heading: DEFECTIVE PRODUCTS
defective.text: If your product arrives defective, contact us immediately for a replacement. We'll cover all shipping costs.

dataCollect.heading: DATA WE COLLECT
dataCollect.intro: We collect minimal data necessary for order processing and product support:
items: Email address (for order updates and newsletter)

dataSharing.heading: DATA SHARING
dataSharing.intro: We do not sell your personal data. We share data only with:

cookies.heading: COOKIES
cookies.text: We use essential cookies for site functionality. You can disable cookies in your browser settings.
